required_action: continue the 908 production run before promoting this to final BTC or transition evidence
evidence_boundary: Use this only for sparse-front saturation and retained-bulk mechanism wording. Do not use it to claim outlet breakthrough, complete BTC, or critical clogging.
candidate_results_sentence: In the high-inventory localized-release case, the maximum debris front reached $x/L=0.9946$ by 10.00 ms, whereas the population remained localized with $x_{99}/L=0.4202$ and a source-retention fraction of 0.8945. Only 14 particles lay beyond $x/L=0.80$ and 2 particles lay beyond $x/L=0.95$; 0 particles crossed the outlet plane. The late maximum-front slope became negative (-5.26% of its early positive value), indicating near-outlet front slowdown/saturation rather than breakthrough.
latex_candidate_sentence:
In the high-inventory localized-release case, the maximum debris front reached $x/L=0.9946$ by \SI{10.00}{ms}, whereas the population remained localized with $x_{99}/L=0.4202$ and a source-retention fraction of 0.8945. Only 
um{14} particles lay beyond $x/L=0.80$ and 
um{2} particles lay beyond $x/L=0.95$; 
um{0} particles crossed the outlet plane. The late maximum-front slope became negative (\SI{-5.26}{\percent} of its early positive value), indicating near-outlet front slowdown/saturation rather than breakthrough.
